desc:
# Agent Python Tools

- repo: oats
- repo_uri: https://github.com/district-solutions/open-agent-tools-coder.git

## File: oats/core/bus.py

Prompts

```
['subscribe to a specific EventType on the EventBus with an async handler function', 'subscribe to all events on the EventBus with a single catch-all handler', 'publish an Event to the EventBus asynchronously notifying all subscribed handlers', 'publish an Event to the EventBus synchronously from a non-async context', 'subscribe to a single occurrence of an EventType that auto-unsubscribes after firing', 'load a Config instance from a coder.json file and environment variables using Config.load()', 'get the global singleton Config instance with get_config() and optionally reload or set a project directory', 'get or create the oats data directory at ~/.local/share/oats using get_data_dir()', 'define an AI provider with ProviderConfig including api_key, base_url, and enabled fields', 'set the active model and provider with ModelConfig using provider_id and model_id fields', 'check if deferred tool loading is enabled via the CODER_FEATURE_DEFERRED_TOOLS environment variable', 'check if reactive compaction for prompt-too-long recovery is enabled via the CODER_FEATURE_REACTIVE_COMPACTION env var', 'check if the on-disk trajectory store for logging user prompts and tool outcomes is enabled', 'check if the declarative plugin loader is enabled via the CODER_FEATURE_PLUGINS environment variable', 'check if streaming should be disabled for a given model ID or via the CODER_FEATURE_NON_STREAMING env var', 'generate a new unique UUID string using uuid4', 'generate a shorter 8 character ID from a UUID', 'create a function that generates unique IDs for entities in the system', 'refactor the ID generation to use a different strategy like nanoid', 'review the ID generation utilities for security and uniqueness guarantees', 'gate an outbound network call by calling require_network with a label and url before making the request', 'check if a URL targets localhost, a LAN host, or a private IP range using is_local_url', 'check whether CODER_OFFLINE_STRICT is enabled by calling offline_strict to toggle strict mode at runtime', 'handle OfflineBlockedError exceptions raised when strict offline mode refuses an external network request', 'review the offline module to understand how require_network gates external calls when CODER_OFFLINE_STRICT is set', 'get the active feature profile from the CODER_PROFILE environment variable or default to standard', 'check if a feature group like browser or web_tools is enabled with env override support', 'describe all feature groups and their enabled status for a named profile or the active one', 'list all built-in profile names like minimal standard and full available in the system', 'reset the cached feature profile to force re-resolution from environment variables on next call', 'create a new item in the Storage class by id and Pydantic model data', 'read an item from the Storage class by its unique id', 'upsert an item in the Storage class creating or updating by id', 'delete an item from the Storage class by its unique id', 'set a key-value pair in the KeyValueStorage class for arbitrary JSON data', 'estimate the token count of a string using tiktoken cl100k_base or a chars over 3.5 fallback', 'sum the estimated token count across a list of session message objects including tool calls and results', 'lazily load and memoize the tiktoken cl100k_base encoder for reuse across token counting calls', 'count tokens with the chars over 3.5 fallback when the CODER_DISABLE_TIKTOKEN environment variable is set to 1', 'estimate tokens for message tool call arguments and tool result outputs and errors in a message list']
```

Usage

```
{'subscribe_to_event_type': 'subscribe to a specific EventType on the EventBus with an async handler function', 'subscribe_to_all_events': 'subscribe to all events on the EventBus with a single catch-all handler', 'publish_event_async': 'publish an Event to the EventBus asynchronously notifying all subscribed handlers', 'publish_event_sync': 'publish an Event to the EventBus synchronously from a non-async context', 'subscribe_once_to_event': 'subscribe to a single occurrence of an EventType that auto-unsubscribes after firing'}
```

'check if a feature group like browser or web_tools is enabled with env override support', 'describe all feature groups and their enabled status for a named profile or the active one', 'list all Storage class by its unique id', 'set a key-value pair in the KeyValueStorage class for arbitrary JSON data', 'estimate the token count of a string using tiktoken cl100k_base or a chars over 3.5 fallback', 'sum the estimated token count across a list of session message objects including tool calls and results', 'lazily load and memoize the tiktoken cl100k_base encoder for reuse across token counting calls', 'count tokens with the chars over 3.5 fallback when the CODER_DISABLE_TIKTOKEN environment variable is set to 1', 'estimate tokens for message tool call arguments and tool result outputs and errors in a message list']
```

{'count_tokens_text': 'estimate the token count of a string using tiktoken cl100k_base or a chars over 3.5 fallback', 'count_message_tokens_list': 'sum the estimated token count across a list of session message objects including tool calls and results', 'get_encoder_lazy': 'lazily load and memoize the tiktoken cl100k_base encoder for reuse across token counting calls', 'count_tokens_disable_tiktoken': 'count tokens with the chars over 3.5 fallback when the CODER_DISABLE_TIKTOKEN environment variable is set to 1', 'count_message_tokens_tool_calls': 'estimate tokens for message tool call arguments and tool result outputs and errors in a message list'}
```
name: oats/core/AGENT.python.tools.md

oats/core/bus.py.subscribe_to_event_type: subscribe to a specific EventType on the EventBus with an async handler function
oats/core/bus.py.subscribe_to_all_events: subscribe to all events on the EventBus with a single catch-all handler
oats/core/bus.py.publish_event_async: publish an Event to the EventBus asynchronously notifying all subscribed handlers
oats/core/bus.py.publish_event_sync: publish an Event to the EventBus synchronously from a non-async context
oats/core/bus.py.subscribe_once_to_event: subscribe to a single occurrence of an EventType that auto-unsubscribes after firing

oats/core/config.py.load_config_from_file: load a Config instance from a coder.json file and environment variables using Config.load()
oats/core/config.py.get_global_config: get the global singleton Config instance with get_config() and optionally reload or set a project directory
oats/core/config.py.get_data_directory: get or create the oats data directory at ~/.local/share/oats using get_data_dir()
oats/core/config.py.configure_ai_provider: define an AI provider with ProviderConfig including api_key, base_url, and enabled fields
oats/core/config.py.configure_model_selection: set the active model and provider with ModelConfig using provider_id and model_id fields

oats/core/features.py.check_deferred_tools: check if deferred tool loading is enabled via the CODER_FEATURE_DEFERRED_TOOLS environment variable
oats/core/features.py.check_reactive_compaction: check if reactive compaction for prompt-too-long recovery is enabled via the CODER_FEATURE_REACTIVE_COMPACTION env var
oats/core/features.py.check_trajectory_store: check if the on-disk trajectory store for logging user prompts and tool outcomes is enabled
oats/core/features.py.check_plugins: check if the declarative plugin loader is enabled via the CODER_FEATURE_PLUGINS environment variable
oats/core/features.py.check_streaming_disabled: check if streaming should be disabled for a given model ID or via the CODER_FEATURE_NON_STREAMING env var

oats/core/id.py.generate_id: generate a new unique UUID string using uuid4
oats/core/id.py.generate_short_id: generate a shorter 8 character ID from a UUID
oats/core/id.py.create_id_generator: create a function that generates unique IDs for entities in the system
oats/core/id.py.refactor_id_generation: refactor the ID generation to use a different strategy like nanoid
oats/core/id.py.review_id_utils: review the ID generation utilities for security and uniqueness guarantees

oats/core/offline.py.require_network_gate: gate an outbound network call by calling require_network with a label and url before making the request
oats/core/offline.py.is_local_url_check: check if a URL targets localhost, a LAN host, or a private IP range using is_local_url
oats/core/offline.py.offline_strict_toggle: check whether CODER_OFFLINE_STRICT is enabled by calling offline_strict to toggle strict mode at runtime
oats/core/offline.py.OfflineBlockedError_handle: handle OfflineBlockedError exceptions raised when strict offline mode refuses an external network request
oats/core/offline.py.review_offline_helpers: review the offline module to understand how require_network gates external calls when CODER_OFFLINE_STRICT is set

oats/core/profiles.py.get_profile: get the active feature profile from the CODER_PROFILE environment variable or default to standard
oats/core/profiles.py.is_feature_enabled: check if a feature group like browser or web_tools is enabled with env override support
oats/core/profiles.py.describe_profile: describe all feature groups and their enabled status for a named profile or the active one
oats/core/profiles.py.list_profiles: list all built-in profile names like minimal standard and full available in the system
oats/core/profiles.py.reset_profile: reset the cached feature profile to force re-resolution from environment variables on next call

oats/core/storage.py.create_storage_item: create a new item in the Storage class by id and Pydantic model data
oats/core/storage.py.read_storage_item: read an item from the Storage class by its unique id
oats/core/storage.py.upsert_storage_item: upsert an item in the Storage class creating or updating by id
oats/core/storage.py.delete_storage_item: delete an item from the Storage class by its unique id
oats/core/storage.py.set_keyvalue: set a key-value pair in the KeyValueStorage class for arbitrary JSON data

oats/core/tokens.py.count_tokens_text: estimate the token count of a string using tiktoken cl100k_base or a chars over 3.5 fallback
oats/core/tokens.py.count_message_tokens_list: sum the estimated token count across a list of session message objects including tool calls and results
oats/core/tokens.py.get_encoder_lazy: lazily load and memoize the tiktoken cl100k_base encoder for reuse across token counting calls
oats/core/tokens.py.count_tokens_disable_tiktoken: count tokens with the chars over 3.5 fallback when the CODER_DISABLE_TIKTOKEN environment variable is set to 1
oats/core/tokens.py.count_message_tokens_tool_calls: estimate tokens for message tool call arguments and tool result outputs and errors in a message list
